evals.prompt: Initialize Project Skills in a parent workspace that contains one existing app repo folder named app/ and no .agents/ folder yet.
evals.expected_output: Should create .agents/, ops/, scratch/, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and safe ignore files. Should reference app/ as the implementation repo. Should not move or modify app/.

evals.prompt: Initialize Project Skills in a workspace with two repos: web-app/ and api/. Do not guess which one is primary.
evals.expected_output: Should list both repo folders and mark implementation repo as TBD or multiple, not choose one silently. Should still create shared workspace scaffolding.
assertions: Keeps repo paths as candidates or TBD

evals.prompt: Initialize Project Skills in an existing workspace with AGENTS.md and .gitignore already present.
evals.expected_output: Should update conservatively or append a Project Skills section without overwriting existing instructions. Should add missing ignore patterns only if absent.

evals.prompt: Initialize Project Skills for a client project that has raw transcript exports available locally.
evals.expected_output: Should create or preserve local-only source locations and ignore raw transcript/export patterns. Should not copy raw transcripts into committed context or ingest them by default.
assertions: Explains that project-context should record source locations only
